problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: Combining Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
